_comment: Enterprise error payload examples following RFC 7807

validation_error_400.title: Validation Error
validation_error_400.detail: One or more fields failed validation.

errors.message: Must be a valid ISO currency code

not_found_404.title: Resource Not Found
not_found_404.detail: Customer with ID 'C-999' does not exist.

business_rule_422.title: Business Rule Violation
business_rule_422.detail: Insufficient account balance. Available: KES 200.00, Requested: KES 5000.00.

rate_limit_429.title: Rate Limit Exceeded
rate_limit_429.detail: You have exceeded 100 requests per minute. Retry after 45 seconds.

downstream_502.title: Downstream Service Unavailable
downstream_502.detail: The SAP system is temporarily unavailable. Please retry in a few minutes.
